# Extração: M1_CourseAttackPlan

- **Fonte:** M1_CourseAttackPlan.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF
- **Páginas:** 0
- **Tamanho:** 0.35 MB

---

Over the course of the next 28 days, I’m going to systematically teach you how to own a
profitable business that could potentially generate a six figure income for you, even while
you sleep.
Below is a battle plan of how we’re going to do it..
After 28 days there is a section on your life as a 10X Business Owner… as well as a bonus
section with interviews with 10X Acquisition entrepreneurs who share their story… experts
in deal making skills… and I share some of my own war stories. All of these bonuses give
you the real world applications of the material we’ll be covering.
If you only want to study the core course material, you can get through it in 28 days.
If you want to consume all of the bonus material, too, it will take you 43 days if you follow
our plan.
Feel free to move at your own pace if you want to go faster or need to go slower.
I’d recommend going through the material more than once. Once as an introduction where
you take notes and complete the work in the resources as practice. And a second time where
you try to execute the blueprint.
Here’s a suggested attack plan to complete the core material in 28 days. With the extra
material post acquisition, it will take you around a month.
And I recommend going through it twice. Once so you can become familiar with the
information. And a second time where you try to execute as you go.
Here’s our suggested attack plan…
Step 1: Print this action plan out.
Step 2: Read through it section by section. Write specific dates down.
Step 3: Set calendar reminders for yourself so do not forget to finish the course.
Course Attack Plan
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
